task:
Visit these six Wikipedia articles in order, fully loading each before moving on, so all six end up in browsing history:

1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Operating_system
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unix
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux_kernel
5. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GNU_Project
6. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_software

Add bookmarks for https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux and https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/GNU_Project (default page titles are fine). The active tab when you finish must be https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_software.

verification.description: Active tab is the Free software article
Bookmark for the Linux article exists
Bookmark for the GNU Project article exists
